integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the Bahmni web interface, not terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Bahmni application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface looks like a genuine healthcare information system (Bahmni), not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing scripts (e.g., Python, bash) to directly insert records into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Provider: Superman. Target Date: 2026-03-12 (March 12, 2026). Target Start Time: 09:00 (09:00:00). Target End Time: 13:00 (13:00:00). Target Location: Registration Desk. The system being used is the Bahmni healthcare information system.
